overall.description: First-person gameplay footage of a player walking along a wooden porch of a rustic log cabin at night. The atmosphere is dark and ominous with atmospheric fog, illuminated by warm lantern light. A humanoid figure briefly appears near the fence before the player continues toward a dark doorway.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden porch of rural log cabin

agents.ego_description: walking slowly along the wooden porch, observing the cabin exterior and surrounding forest

entered.detail: rustic log cabin wall with horizontal timber construction and small windows
wooden post with warm glowing lantern illuminating the foggy atmosphere
simple wooden fence running along the edge of the porch
weathered wooden planks forming the porch walkway

segments.scene_description: The player walks along a wooden porch of a log cabin at night. Warm lantern light cuts through the fog, illuminating the rustic timber walls and wooden fence railing. The atmosphere is quiet and tense as the player moves forward.

events.description: humanoid figure emerges from darkness near the wooden fence on the left

agents.ego_description: slowing slightly as a figure appears near the fence, maintaining cautious forward movement

notable_agents.action: crouching or crawling near the fence, partially obscured by darkness and fog

segments.scene_description: As the player approaches the corner of the porch, a humanoid figure becomes visible crouching near the fence on the left. The figure appears to be an enemy or zombie, partially hidden in the shadows. The player continues moving forward cautiously.

events.description: turns left along the porch into a narrower covered walkway section
enters darker covered section with reduced ambient light

agents.ego_description: turning left along the porch and proceeding into a darker covered walkway, moving away from the figure

entered.detail: overhead wooden roof structure covering the walkway
vertical wooden posts supporting the porch roof

segments.scene_description: The player turns left into a narrower covered walkway, leaving the fenced area behind. The space becomes darker and more enclosed as the roof blocks the sky. Wooden support posts line the path as the player moves deeper into the covered section.

events.description: approaching dark doorway at the end of the covered walkway

agents.ego_description: walking toward a dark doorway at the end of the narrow walkway, preparing to enter the cabin

entered.detail: dark open doorway at the end of the walkway leading into the cabin

segments.scene_description: The player proceeds through the narrow covered walkway toward a dark doorway. The space is dimly lit by a single lantern as the player approaches the entrance to the cabin, creating a tense atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement along a rustic porch that transitions from an open, lantern-lit exterior into a claustrophobic, dark walkway. It begins with a steady walk past timber walls and a wooden fence, where warm light cuts through a tense, foggy atmosphere. As the camera approaches the corner of the porch, a humanoid figure crouching in the shadows briefly emerges near the railing before the player cautiously moves past. The scene then shifts as the camera turns left into a narrower covered walkway, leaving the open air behind for a more enclosed space lined with wooden support posts. Finally, the environment grows increasingly dim, guided by a single lantern as the camera proceeds toward a dark, ominous doorway.
